siteSettings.footerText: © 2026 S M Turag. Crafted with Linear & Vercel Inspired Architecture.

personal.name: S M Turag
personal.heroSubtitle: Full Stack Web Developer specializing in front-end & back-end development. Experienced with all stages of the development cycle for dynamic web and cross-platform mobile applications.
personal.bio: I am S M Turag, a dedicated Full Stack Web and Mobile App Developer. I architect scalable web platforms and mobile applications using modern technologies including Laravel, React.js, Next.js, Node.js, React Native, and Flutter. Proven track record developing high-traffic FinTech solutions, real-time WebRTC streaming systems, multiplayer socket applications, and enterprise e-commerce platforms.

services.title: Full Stack Web Engineering
services.description: Developing high-performance, responsive web applications using React.js, Next.js, and modern CSS architecture with complete SEO optimization.

services.title: Cross-Platform Mobile Apps
services.description: Building native-grade iOS and Android mobile applications using React Native and Flutter, ensuring seamless UI/UX and 60fps animations.

services.title: Backend, APIs & Database Architecture
services.description: Designing robust RESTful APIs, real-time WebRTC/Socket.IO communication, and optimized schemas across MySQL, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB.

services.title: DevOps, Server & System Management
services.description: Managing Linux servers, Docker containerization, cloud deployments, and automated testing following SOLID principles and PSR standards.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.technologies: Laravel, Node.js, Express, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Git
responsibilities: Designed, developed, and maintained robust RESTful APIs using Laravel and Node.js/Express, serving both web and mobile applications.
Architected and optimized database schemas (MySQL/PostgreSQL/MongoDB) for scalability, data integrity, and performance.
Implemented authentication and authorization systems (JWT, Laravel Sanctum/Passport) to ensure secure access control.
Optimized backend performance through query optimization, caching (Redis), and efficient code structuring, reducing API response time significantly.
Wrote and maintained clean, testable code following MVC architecture and best practices (SOLID principles, PSR standards).
Managed server deployment and version control using Git, ensuring high availability and CI/CD workflows.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
responsibilities: Developed and maintained scalable web applications using Laravel, React.js, and Node.js, ensuring high performance and responsiveness.
Designed and implemented RESTful APIs to enable seamless communication between frontend and backend systems.
Built cross-platform mobile applications using React Native, delivering consistent user experience across iOS and Android.
Collaborated with UI/UX designers and backend teams to translate business requirements into functional, user-friendly features.
Participated in code reviews, debugging, and performance optimization.

experience.title: Real-Time Systems & Mobile App Architect
responsibilities: Architected and engineered low-latency Real-Time Live Streaming applications using WebRTC signaling servers, Node.js event loops, Laravel backends, and Flutter cross-platform frontends.
Built a synchronized Multiplayer Ludo Gaming Engine featuring real-time room state management, high-frequency websocket event dispatching via Socket.IO, and secure match validation.
Designed RESTful APIs and distributed socket communication channels ensuring seamless 60fps mobile performance across iOS and Android.
Wrote clean, modular backend architectures following SOLID design principles and PSR standards for high-concurrency client workloads.

liveProjects.name: Live Streaming App (Laravel, Node.js, WebRTC, Flutter)
Multiplayer Ludo Game Engine (Laravel, Node.js, Socket.IO)
